items.title: On vacation but quick takeaways from the Mosley presser.
items.author: Shamit Dua
items.body_excerpt:
On vacation but quick takeaways from the Mosley presser.

1) make no mistake Jordan Dumars is an influential inner circle voice in the Pelicans. Pelicans still have not formally hired him. 

2) messaging on defense was loud and clear, which is good for a young team.

Cont.

items.title: Hollander POTD Roger Brown. NYC star got blacklisted for bogus gambling scandal. Played in minors til ABA then starred for IND from 1967-1974. 4x all-star peaked at 23 ppg. Dominated 70 Finals. Per bio "he shouldn't even bother to show up before the playoffs." Died too young RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Roger Brown. NYC star got blacklisted for bogus gambling scandal. Played in minors til ABA then starred for IND from 1967-1974. 4x all-star peaked at 23 ppg. Dominated 70 Finals. Per bio "he shouldn't even bother to show up before the playoffs." Died too young RIP.
